moments.title: World Cup Round of 32 Begins!
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages kick off today with the Round of 32, featuring intense matchups as teams battle to progress.

angles.name: Knockout Drama
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 just got serious! It's the Round of 32 today, meaning every match is sudden death. Who are you backing to go all the way?

angles.name: Today's Fixtures
angles.copy: Don't miss the start of the World Cup Round of 32 today! Brazil v Japan at 6pm, Germany v Paraguay at 9:30pm. Get ready for some knockout action.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The greatest tennis tournament in the world, The Championships, Wimbledon, begins tomorrow, Monday June 29th, with two weeks of thrilling grass-court action.

angles.name: Grass Court Excitement
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off tomorrow, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: Centre Court Calling
angles.copy: It's almost time! The All England Club opens its gates for Wimbledon 2026 tomorrow. Get ready for some incredible action right here in London.

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival
moments.blurb: Europe's largest outdoor summer jazz festival, Love Supreme, brings three days of jazz, soul, and R&B to Glynde Place, East Sussex, from July 3rd-5th.

angles.name: Jazz, Soul & Funk Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for a soulful weekend! Love Supreme Jazz Festival is just days away in East Sussex, bringing the best in jazz, soul, and R&B. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Sun, sounds, and good vibes! The Love Supreme Festival kicks off this Friday. Perfect for a chilled out weekend of incredible music.

moments.title: Geri Halliwell turns 54
moments.blurb: Geri Halliwell, the iconic 'Ginger Spice' from the Spice Girls, celebrates her 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Spice Up Your Day
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Geri Halliwell! Our favourite Ginger Spice is still bringing the power. What's your top Spice Girls track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Forever a pop icon! Sending birthday wishes to Geri Halliwell, turning 54 today. She gave us some of the biggest anthems of the 90s!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, best known as the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Don't Cha Wish
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Tomorrow, Nicole Scherzinger turns 48. From Pussycat Dolls to solo hits, she's a true superstar!

angles.name: Pop & Dance Queen
angles.copy: Tomorrow's a big one for Nicole Scherzinger! Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible singer and performer. What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

moments.title: Ralf Hütter turns 80
moments.blurb: Ralf Hütter, co-founder and lead vocalist of the pioneering electronic band Kraftwerk, celebrates his 80th birthday on June 30th.

angles.name: Electronic Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to Ralf Hütter of Kraftwerk on Tuesday! A true pioneer of electronic music.

angles.name: Techno Trailblazer
angles.copy: 80 years young! Ralf Hütter, the visionary behind Kraftwerk, celebrates his birthday on June 30th. Respect to a legend who shaped modern dance music.

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: The iconic lead singer of Blondie, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Punk Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry on July 1st! The ultimate punk rock icon and voice of Blondie.

angles.name: Timeless Style
angles.copy: Still looking fabulous at 81! Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Blondie's Debbie Harry this Wednesday. What's your favourite Blondie hit?

moments.title: Missy Elliott turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Queen of Hip-Hop
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The incredible Missy Elliott turns 55 this Wednesday. A true legend of hip-hop and R&B!

angles.name: Innovative Icon
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to Missy Elliott on July 1st! Her innovative beats and iconic videos changed the game. What's your favourite track she produced?

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Synthesizer legend Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Pop Maestro
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the brilliant Vince Clarke on Friday! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his synth magic defined an era.

angles.name: Electronic Music Godfather
angles.copy: A true innovator! Wishing Vince Clarke a very happy 66th birthday on July 3rd. His influence on electronic music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: Genre-bending superstar Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Circles', celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to Post Malone on July 4th! The artist who consistently tops the charts with his unique sound. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Rockstar Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st birthday this Thursday! From hip-hop to country to rock, he does it all.

moments.title: 50 Cent turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis James Jackson III) celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Saturday. What's your favourite track from the hip-hop mogul?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Mogul
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent on July 6th! A true force in music and entertainment.

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr this Sunday. What's your favourite Beatles song featuring Ringo on vocals?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: An absolute icon of music! Happy 86th Birthday to Ringo Starr on July 7th. Thank you for the timeless beats!

moments.title: Ally Brooke turns 33
moments.blurb: Singer Ally Brooke, known for her powerful vocals in Fifth Harmony, celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Fifth Harmony Star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredibly talented Ally Brooke on Sunday! From Fifth Harmony to solo success, she's a vocal powerhouse.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Sending birthday love to Ally Brooke this July 7th! The 'little big sister' of Fifth Harmony turns 33. What's your favourite 5H track?
